description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle, visually resembling the AK-47, with a robust, elongated black metal body and a fixed synthetic stock. The rifle features a prominent barrel with a front sight post and a gas tube above the barrel, characteristic of this firearm type. The receiver is boxy and includes a visible trigger guard, magazine well, and selector switch. The handguard and stock are both solid and appear to be made from a durable polymer or composite material, while the barrel and receiver are metallic. The magazine is slightly curved and detachable, typical for this rifle style. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a utilitarian and tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black assault rifle with a fixed synthetic stock, curved detachable magazine, and prominent barrel with iron sights. The design is robust and utilitarian, featuring both metal and polymer components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and barrel with front sight.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with the magazine and stock clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the stock and the narrow alignment of the receiver and barrel.
